must_find.description: Verbose nested if/if-let chain for content_block_delta parsing: three levels of indentation can be flattened to one level using let-chain syntax
Three-level nesting for content_block_start tool_use detection: can be a single flat let-chain condition
Nested if/if-let for assistant message parsing with tool_use detection: let-chain would reduce indentation
extract_file_change has unnecessary nesting: conditions can be combined into a single let-chain

must_not_flag.description: Using msg_type string comparisons is the correct approach for parsing unstructured JSON — a match statement would work but if-chains are equally valid here
Using .unwrap_or("unknown") for tool names is proper default handling, not a simplicity issue
